raw.message: You are a WSOP player, of course you get a Daily Bonus 🤑

hook.summary: High-energy text-based announcement with neon visuals.
hook.visual_action: Rapidly flashing large 3D text overlays against a dark background with blue and purple laser beams.

scene_flow: High-energy text intro announcing a major update or return.
Showcase of massive chip stacks and spinning reward wheels on a poker table.
Transition through flying poker chips to a character reveal.
Introduction of the 'Loot Lane' feature with multipliers and slot icons.
End card with the game logo and a 'Claim Now' button.
audience_proxy: Competitive poker players and social casino fans who enjoy high-energy rewards and progression systems.
